commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.review_summary:
The branch modifies only `pnpm-lock.yaml`, resolving `react-resizable-panels` 4.11.2 while also resolving `date-fns` 4.3.0 and `react-hook-form` 7.76.1.

Reproducibility: yes. source inspection of the PR diff shows unrelated lockfile upgrades for `date-fns` and `react-hook-form` alongside the intended `react-resizable-panels` bump.
commands.review_followup: The remaining blocker is a narrow mechanical lockfile repair that automation can attempt without product judgment.

Dependabot commands and options
